description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Test: unit that runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest jobs with a single mode, debug. The workflow should trigger on a weekly schedule from Monday to Friday at 21:00 and allow manual dispatch. For each job, check out the omnetpp and inet repositories, set up ccache, restore the ccache cache, install required packages, build omnetpp and inet using scripts, and run unit tests with the runtest command.
